name: OpenSky live aircraft states over Georgia
reason: The documented bbox endpoint was requested anonymously three times, including with an identifying User-Agent, and returned HTTP 503 each time. Current OpenSky terms limit ordinary authorization to non-profit research/education and require a written license for any operational REST API use, even by a non-profit; commercial entities also require written permission.
boundary: Do not catalog OpenSky as a currently validated live Georgia feed or use it operationally without a written license. Retry only for research validation after service recovery; aircraft identifiers can also raise privacy/security concerns.

name: Mapillary Tbilisi imagery API
status: Credential-gated; local structured query not validated
reason: Mapillary's Graph API and official demo require an access token before bbox image metadata or detections can be queried. No user-provided token was available, so public-map appearance was not converted into an asserted machine-readable local inventory.
boundary: A future catalog record requires an authorized token, a live Tbilisi bbox response, exact returned fields, quota details and current Mapillary image/data reuse terms. Do not expose a client token in the report.

name: KartaView / OpenStreetCam street-level imagery in Georgia
reason: Both the current v2 nearby-photo query and legacy unauthenticated nearby-photo endpoint returned empty results. Additional 20 km searches around central Tbilisi, Batumi and Kutaisi also returned zero photos.
boundary: The API is machine-readable, but it did not genuinely contain validated Tbilisi/Georgia imagery in this pass. Recheck coverage later; do not use documentation examples from other countries as local evidence.

name: GDACS disaster-alert filtering for Georgia
status: Global API verified; Georgia-local record not validated
reason: The GeoJSON event-list endpoint returned 203 current worldwide records and a full schema, but the attempted country-filtered searches returned either no content or broad substring matches unrelated to Georgia. No current Georgia event was present in the returned global feature set.
boundary: Keep GDACS as a monitored global avenue, not a local catalog page, until a reproducible Georgia event or geometry query is validated. USGS and FIRMS already provide locally evidenced earthquake and fire records.

name: Open-Meteo CAMS air-quality forecast
reason: A Tbilisi query returned current and hourly PM10, PM2.5, CO, NO2, SO2, ozone, aerosol optical depth, dust, UV index and European AQI. The local civic/environment batch already contains official Georgian station observations, which are preferable for measured local conditions; the Open-Meteo response is modeled CAMS forecast data.
boundary: Treat as a forecast/model complement only and label it CAMS-derived. Do not merge modeled values with official station readings without source and spatial-resolution labels. Omitted from the ten-source import set to avoid duplication.

name: NASA POWER daily agroclimate point API
reason: The Tbilisi point API returned daily temperature, corrected precipitation, humidity, wind, solar irradiance and evapotranspiration-energy values, plus units and source metadata. Recent days contained the documented -999 fill value. Its broad weather/agroclimate role overlaps the included Open-Meteo history record and was outside the prioritized ten-source set.
boundary: Credible secondary source worth a later page if solar/agriculture coverage is desired. Preserve -999 as missing, not a measurement, and do not conflate gridded POWER values with station observations.
